## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python: [e.g., 3.10.12]
- Browser: [e.g., Firefox 128, Chrome 126]
- ZICORE Version: [e.g., 0.4.0]
- Deployment: [Local / Docker / Colab]

Any other context about the problem.
